purpose: Guides users starting net-new product development through strategy, blueprinting, PRD authoring, and v1 architecture design.
selection_order: Warns users when prerequisite artifacts are missing.

children.name: labs21-chief-architect
children.summary: Stage 1: Strategy, OKR, MVP, and Clean Architecture Blueprint.
route_when: Starting a new product from a raw idea
Designing the architecture for a v1.0 system
Preparing a pitch or system spec from scratch

children.name: labs21-prd-writer
children.summary: Stage 2: Translates blueprint into PRD, User Stories, and Acceptance Criteria.
route_when: A strategic blueprint has been validated
Preparing user stories and acceptance criteria for engineering
Defining business logic rules and edge case behavior

children.name: labs21-system-architect
children.summary: Stage 3: Translates PRD into concrete Technical Architecture (Schema, API, ADRs).
route_when: A validated PRD exists and engineering is about to begin
Defining data schemas, API contracts, or state flows
Making infrastructure decisions that will be costly to reverse
